title: The Biggest Bluff
author: Maria Konnikova
subline: How I learned to pay attention, master myself, and win.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Five playing cards spread in a fan across the top 2/3. ONE is RED (the ace of spades — the bluff). Title is below. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none">
    <!-- Card 1 (leftmost, slight left tilt) -->
    <g transform="translate(-720 0) rotate(-18 0 240)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-90" y="0" width="180" height="260"/>
      <text x="-78" y="32" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">5</text>
      <text x="-78" y="50" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">♠</text>
      <circle cx="0" cy="180" r="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Card 2 (left, slight tilt) -->
    <g transform="translate(-380 -40) rotate(-9 0 240)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-90" y="0" width="180" height="260"/>
      <text x="-78" y="32" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">K</text>
      <text x="-78" y="50" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">♥</text>
      <circle cx="0" cy="180" r="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Card 3 (CENTER, upright) -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -60) rotate(0 0 240)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-90" y="0" width="180" height="260"/>
      <text x="-78" y="32" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">9</text>
      <text x="-78" y="50" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">♦</text>
      <circle cx="0" cy="180" r="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Card 4 (right, slight tilt) -->
    <g transform="translate(380 -40) rotate(9 0 240)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-90" y="0" width="180" height="260"/>
      <text x="-78" y="32" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">J</text>
      <text x="-78" y="50" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">♣</text>
      <circle cx="0" cy="180" r="30" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Card 5 (rightmost, slight right tilt) — the RED ACE OF SPADES, the 'bluff' -->
    <g transform="translate(720 0) rotate(18 0 240)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none">
      <rect x="-90" y="0" width="180" height="260"/>
      <text x="-78" y="32" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">A</text>
      <text x="-78" y="50" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">♠</text>
      <!-- A large spade silhouette in the center -->
      <path d="M 0 80 C -20 130 -40 160 -40 180 C -40 200 -25 210 -10 205 L -10 215 L 10 215 L 10 205 C 25 210 40 200 40 180 C 40 160 20 130 0 80 Z" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Poker IS the book's frame. Five playing cards fanned across the top 2/3 like a dealer's spread, with suits and rank labels. The rightmost card — the Ace of Spades, the biggest bluff in the deck — is RED 2.5px outline with a large spade silhouette in the middle. The other four are graphite. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 300 whisper, mixed-case. Brand 'POKER' in the top-left; pill 'ALL IN' at the top — Konnikova's actual move in the book.
